content: Vampire Cattle: Fuckin’ cold tonight, ain’t it? These shitty rags don’t do shit against this wind. Should’ve let those bandits from last week just rape me—at least they had fur-lined armor. Vampire Cattle 2: Pfft, you say that every time. Bet you’re just pissed that Falmer got to ‘em first. Saw their corpses strung up near the ruin, holes used till they were dry. Dibella’s tits, those blind fuckers don’t waste a drop. Vampire Cattle: Hah! Like you didn’t watch ‘em work. Saw your cock twitch when they dragged that one screaming into the shadows. Whole damn place reeked of cum and guts by dawn. Vampire Cattle 2: Yeah, well… at least the Falmer know how to share. Not like our masters, hoarding every bite like it’s gold. I’d take a savage fucking over starving in the dark any day. Vampire Cattle: Gods, don’t start on the blood-rationing again. Last time you whined about it, Garan kicked your teeth in let the gargoyle have you. Still limpin’, huh? Vampire Cattle 2: Fuck you. That winged bastard ripped my pants . Chafes like hell now. But hey, least I got a story—unlike you, moanin’ about bandits that never came. Vampire Cattle: Oh, they’ll come. Rest of Skyrim’s too busy rutting in taverns to fight, but sooner or later, some horny bastard’ll trip into this shithole. And I’ll get my fur cloak. Vampire Cattle 2: Sure, sweetroll. Keep dreamin’. Till then, you’re stuck shivering—just like me. Dibella’s blessing my ass. This place smells like cold piss and old lust.

Vampire Cattle 2: Speaking of cold piss, I swear one of those thrall fuckers pissed in the corner again. Smells worse than a skeever's ass after a skooma binge. Vampire Cattle: Bet it was that milk-drinker Hestla. Saw her limp-wristed feeding earlier—barely left a mark on the cattle. Fuckin’ disgrace. Vampire Cattle 2: Eh. Let her starve. More for us when she finally trips and cracks her skull open on the stairs. Till then, I'm findin' a warm corner to rub one out. Dream of better days—or worse ones. Whatever keeps the blood warm. Vampire Cattle: Yeah, yeah. Just don’t wake me when you start moaning Garan’s name again. Fuckin’ pathetic.
